summary: Iteration 246 — Accounting module enhancements verified end-to-end. Backend: 16/16 pytest cases pass (vendor-types seeding 17 + CRUD + dup; master defaults counts payment_source=13, project_business_unit=14, cost_center=19; expense_type = authoritative 10 with no legacy short names; expense_category 3-level tree with 11 unique roots; IT>Software Licenses=11, HR>Salaries=6, Production>Raw Materials=9, Administration>Repairs=4; Logistics & Travel extra L1s present; masters summary excludes vendor/employee/city_location; Vendors & Employees CRUD + duplicate checks). Frontend: switched to Accounting module via module-selector — sidebar exposes Accounting Masters / Vendors / Employees; Vendors page loaded, Vendor Type dropdown populated (selected IT Vendor), city autocomplete worked, create+delete flow succeeded; Employees page loaded, create+delete flow succeeded; Accounting Masters page no longer shows Vendor/Employee/City-Location tabs (only 8 expected tabs). No critical issues found.

issues: React warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled' for the Vendor Type Select. Cosmetic only — initialize value to '' instead of undefined.

action_items: (Optional) Fix React controlled/uncontrolled warning on VendorsAccounting Select by initialising vendor_type to '' in the form state.
critical_code_review_comments: accounting_entities.py PATCH uses the same required VendorIn / EmployeeIn model — clients must resend all fields. Consider a *Patch model with all Optional fields for true partial updates.
vendor_types.py exposes no role gate on GET (intentional for dropdowns) but the same _require_admin pattern is repeated across files; consider a shared dependency.
Employee duplicate-code check is case-insensitive on create/patch — good. Consider also enforcing uniqueness of (tenant_id, employee_code) via a Mongo index for race-safety.
seed_data_creation: All seeding is automatic on first GET; tests rely on this. Created and cleaned up TEST_VT_*, TEST_Vendor_*, TEST_Emp_*, TEST_UI_Vendor_*, TEST_UI_Emp_*.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vendor Types collection = vendor_types; route prefix /api/vendor-types. Vendors/Employees under /api/accounting/vendors and /api/accounting/employees. Expense category seeded once per tenant via accounting_seed_markers (key expense_category_v1) so re-running tests is safe. Module switch in UI is via [data-testid=module-selector] menu item 'Accounting'.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all targeted behaviour matches the PRD.
